accommodations.text: Allow access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed.
accommodations.source_quote: access to a designated quiet space when overwhelmed

accommodations.text: State task expectations explicitly and in writing.
accommodations.source_quote: state task expectations explicitly and in writing

accommodations.text: Break multi-step directions into chunked, numbered steps.
accommodations.source_quote: break multi-step directions into numbered steps

accommodations.text: Pair auditory alerts and directions with a visual cue.
accommodations.source_quote: pair auditory alerts with a visual cue

accommodations.text: Allow additional wait time for verbal responses.
accommodations.source_quote: additional wait time for verbal responses

services.source_quote: Specialized academic instruction mathematics 30 minutes 5 times weekly

goals.text: Ethan will complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities without redirection.
goals.baseline: Completes in-class assignments in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: complete and submit in-class assignments in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Sofia will retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Retells a narrative with only a beginning in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: retell a short narrative with a beginning, middle, and end

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: use a taught script to join a peer activity

goals.text: Jamal will read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Reads grade-level text at 80 words per minute.
goals.source_quote: read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy

goals.text: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Reports FM system problems with prompting in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently report FM system problems in 4 of 5 opportunities
